title: aster ageratoides var. grossedentatus
intro: Aster ageratoides var. grossedentatus, also known as White Pyrethrum, is a variety of the Aster ageratoides plant, a flowering perennial native to China and Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as having antiviral and antifungal properties. Herbal preparations of White Pyrethrum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make medicinal teas, creams, and ointments.
